pr_title: Add post-merge quality gate for lever validation
pr_description: Adds 3 validation checks before saving levers to cleaned output (`002-10-potential_levers.json`) Check 1: Skip levers with review-text contamination in consequences (`Controls...vs.` or `Weakness:`) — targets qwen3-30b's 60/75 field-boundary leakage Check 2: Skip levers with bracket placeholders (`[text]`) in any field — targets llama3.1 placeholder leaks Check 3: Skip duplicate lever names across all calls
